ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "asin" TEXT /* ASIN (Amazon Standard Identification Number) of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the product page */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image URL of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_url" TEXT /* URL of the product reviews */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "original_price" REAL /* Original price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary category of the product */,
  "price_history" TEXT /* JSON array of price changes over time */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity of the product */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is featured */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the product record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand FOREIGN KEY ("brand") REFERENCES brands ("brand_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given in the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "date_changed" TEXT /* Date and time the price was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., customer, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_product, edit_product) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id", "permission_id")
)
